pullRequest.title: [DOM-55010] Load favicon after whitelabel settings fetch

nodes.body:
Just a heads up.

The changes are ok but I think this won't resolve the original issue. Even if we await for the white label settings to load, then the whitelabel settings will bring this for domino:
![image](https://github.com/cerebrotech/domino/assets/142441807/751eede0-d2a6-47cb-8a0a-309dc677bf8c)
I would give a try to this solution and in addition either keeping the nucleus favicon or modifying the path that is returned by `/v4/admin/whitelabel/configurations`

cc @jenniferjfu2
I am going to build a deployment
